info.title: mailrs API
info.description: Email server REST API for sending, reading, and managing email

tags.name: Mail
tags.description: Send, read, and manage email messages

post.summary: Authenticate and get a session token

get.summary: Get the current authenticated user info
List all mail folders for the authenticated user
Get full message details by UID
Get extracted text content of an attachment (OCR/PDF)

403.description: Not authorized to send from this address

schema.description: Form fields: from, to, cc, bcc, subject, body, html_body, in_reply_to, reply_to_thread_id, list_unsubscribe (same as SendMessageRequest), plus one or more file attachments

post.summary: Upload an inline image for use in HTML email body

get.summary: Serve a previously uploaded inline image
List all drafts for the authenticated user

post.summary: Record classification feedback for a sender

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Unix timestamp cursor for pagination (return conversations older than this)

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by category (personal, notification, promotion, spam, scam, general)

post.summary: Perform a batch action on multiple conversations

get.summary: Get conversation counts grouped by category
Semantic (vector) search across conversations using AI embeddings

200.description: Semantic search results with similarity scores

get.summary: Get all messages in a conversation thread

200.description: List of messages in the thread

post.summary: Mark all messages in a thread as read
Remove star from a conversation thread

put.summary: Snooze a thread until a specified time
Toggle an emoji reaction on a message

get.summary: Get all reactions for messages in a thread

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query for contact name or address

post.summary: Create a new API key (session auth only)

403.description: API keys cannot create other API keys

get.summary: List all active API keys for the authenticated user

404.description: API key not found or already revoked

201.description: Webhook created (includes signing secret — save it, cannot be retrieved again)

404.description: Webhook not found or already deleted

post.summary: Run DNS health check on a domain (MX, SPF, DKIM, DMARC)

schema.description: Domain DNS health check report with MX, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC results

get.summary: Get groups an account belongs to

200.description: Result (message contains the new group ID)

get.summary: Get permissions assigned to a group

put.summary: Set permissions for a group (replaces existing)

post.summary: Add a member to a group

delete.summary: Remove a member from a group

post.summary: Create a new application with an initial API key

201.description: App created with initial API key

bearerAuth.description: Session token from /api/auth/login or API key (mlrs_...)

reactions.description: Map of message ID to reaction summaries

key.description: Full key if recently created, null otherwise

url.description: Webhook endpoint URL (must be https, or http for localhost)

signing_secret.description: HMAC signing secret (save immediately, cannot be retrieved again)
